name: ClickMonster
short_description: An incredibly colorful and dynamic clicker in which you will plunge into the world of unique monsters, visit amazing worlds and acquire new improvements over time.
detailed_description:
ClickMonster is a Hardcore clicker where the player must call out monsters, buy upgrades, collect gold, and advance through unique worlds in complete infinity.


Feature of game:
- Complexity
- Beautiful Visual style
- Dynamic Music
- 30 Unique Monsters
- Bosses
about_the_game:
